petrify.name: Petrify
petrify.desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Speed of opposing Pokemon by 1 stage. Pokemon behind a substitute are immune.
petrify.shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Speed of opponents by 1 stage.

lazy.name: Lazy
lazy.shortDesc: This Pokemon falls asleep on Switch-in.

infuriate.name: Infuriate
infuriate.shortDesc: If this Pokemon is hit by a physical attack, its attack is raised by 1 stage.

quickcharge.name: Quick Charge
quickcharge.shortDesc: On this Pokemon's first turn, its moves have +4 priority.

bloodlust.name: Blood Lust
bloodlust.shortDesc: After an attack, holder gains 1/6 of the damage in HP dealt to other Pokemon.

sharpcoral.name: Sharp Coral
sharpcoral.shortDesc: Doubles the user's offensive stats and halves its defensive stats.

energizate.name: Energizate
energizate.desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type.
energizate.shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric type and have 1.2x power.

atomizate.name: Atomizate
atomizate.desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Nuclear-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type.
atomizate.shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Nuclear type and have 1.2x power.

geigersense.name: Geiger Sense
geigersense.shortDesc: Raises this Pokemon's Atk and Sp. Atk if a Nuclear-type Pokemon is on the field.

rebuild.name: Rebuild
rebuild.shortDesc: If this Pokemon is not hit by an attack during a turn, it heals 1/8th HP.

deepfreeze.name: Deep Freeze
deepfreeze.shortDesc: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be frozen.

leadskin.name: Lead Skin
leadskin.shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to Nuclear-type moves.

stormbringer.name: Stormbringer
stormbringer.shortDesc: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Thunderstorm.

disenchant.name: Disenchant
disenchant.shortDesc: This Pokemon is immune to Fairy-type moves.

elementalist.name: Elementalist
elementalist.shortDesc: User's Fire, Water, and Electric moves become STAB.
